primary_estimand: Mean paired exact-accuracy difference between B02-N03 and the control across 192 sequence cases, averaging the two execution outcomes within each case.
material_collapse_rule: A material collapse occurs if either B02-N03 replicate is below 45% exact accuracy or the two B02-N03 replicate accuracies differ by more than 10 percentage points.
success_checks: B02-N03 average exact accuracy is above 50%.
B02-N03 average exact accuracy exceeds the control by at least 5 percentage points.
The paired stratified 95% interval lower bound is above zero.
secondary_analysis: Report B02-H01 descriptively, but do not replace the validation-selected champion after hidden outcomes are known.
